overwhelmed.pattern: This usually happens when you’ve got too many things on at once
overwhelmed.action: Pick ONE task only and finish it

angry.pattern: This tends to hit when something feels unfair or out of control
angry.action: Step away first — don’t react immediately

sad.pattern: This usually comes when energy is low or things feel heavy
sad.action: Take a small step and keep it gentle

lost.pattern: This tends to happen when direction isn’t clear
